descriptions: Hazard gang originally derived from Varrio White Fence.
edges.evidence_quote: gangs such as the Avenues (AVES), Frogtown (FTR), Hazard (BH), and other sections in the area originally derived from Varrio White Fence.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Judegang & Ultras Opravcy- Cracovia

descriptions: Evil Corp may be using Raspberry Robin's infrastructure for attacks.
edges.evidence_quote: IBM suggested that Evil Corp may be using Raspberry Robin infrastructure to carry out attacks.

descriptions: Charlestown Mob competed with Angiulo brothers for control of rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: until Irish Mob groups such as the Winter Hill Gang and the Charlestown Mob decided to run the rackets in their own neighborhoods

descriptions: The Winter Hill Gang and the Charlestown Mob were in conflict during the Irish Mob War of the 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Irish Mob War is the name given to conflicts throughout the 1960s between the two dominant Irish-American organized crime gangs in Massachusetts: the Charlestown Mob in Boston... and the Winter Hill Gang of Somerville...

descriptions: Al-Nusra opposed the YPJ.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... YPJ

descriptions: YPG and YPJ jointly signed a commitment, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: the YPG and YPJ signed the Geneva Call Deed of Commitment protecting children in armed conflict

descriptions: The Floccari split from the Cataldo to form their own 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine degli anni '90 i Floccari si staccano dai Cataldo formando una 'ndrina a sé.

descriptions: In Locri, the Cordì are allied with the Floccari.
edges.evidence_quote: A Locri sono alleati con i Floccari.

Kumi 415.description: Predominantly African-American prison gang formed in Folsom State Prison in the mid-1980s by inmates from the San Francisco Bay Area. The name combines the Swahili word for ten (kumi) with San Francisco's area code 415. Members often incorporate African symbols and Swahili language into their culture and tattoos. The gang operates in several California prisons and selected areas.

descriptions: KUMI 415 is listed as a current ally of BGF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Current: , Black Disciples , Bloods , Crips , Dead Man Incorporated , El Rukn , KUMI 415 , Norteños , Nuestra Familia

descriptions: Kumi 415 members serve as a recruitment pool for the Black Guerrilla Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Along with the Crips and Bloods , Kumi 415 members have recently provided recruitment pools for the Black Guerrilla Family , a gang with similarly large numbers in the Bay area and Northern California .

descriptions: Brief alliances among Bloods, Crips, and Kumi 415 in Monterey County Jail.
time_periods: period leading up to Stanley Williams' execution
edges.evidence_quote: In the Monterey County Jail , brief alliances have been reported among the Bloods, Crips, and Kumi 415 during the period leading up to Stanley Williams ' execution.

descriptions: Brief alliances among Bloods, Crips, and Kumi 415 in Monterey County Jail.
time_periods: period leading up to Stanley Williams' execution
edges.evidence_quote: In the Monterey County Jail , brief alliances have been reported among the Bloods, Crips, and Kumi 415 during the period leading up to Stanley Williams ' execution.

descriptions: Black Rhinos is a support club for Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Bandidos and their support club Black Rhinos MC were present at the men's trial and visited a nearby restaurant during a recess in the proceedings where they were ambushed by three gunmen

descriptions: Southern Cross Hammerskins and Blood & Honour co-hosted a concert.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2019, the Southern Cross Hammerskins along with Blood & Honour Australia held the annual Ian Stuart Donaldson Memorial Concert in Melbourne.

descriptions: Gran Grif has a rival relationship with Ti Mepri.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ti Mepri

edges.target: Patriotic and Democratic Front of the Great National Union of Kampuchea
descriptions: The Khmer Rouge created the Patriotic and Democratic Front of the Great National Union of Kampuchea.
edges.evidence_quote: In an attempt to broaden its support base, the Khmer Rouge formed the Patriotic and Democratic Front of the Great National Union of Kampuchea in 1979.

descriptions: Al-Nusra was allied with Ajnad al-Kavkaz.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Ajnad al-Kavkaz

descriptions: Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri and Iannazzo-Giampà were in conflict in the Lamezia Terme feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Lamezia Terme : prese il via nel 2000 e si protrae a fasi alterne fino al 2011, cosche protagoniste sono i Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri e gli Iannazzo - Giampà

descriptions: Giampà and Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri were once a single organization but split and became rivals in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: A partire dal 2002, a seguito della sentenza del processo Primi passi i locali di 'ndrangheta dei Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri e quello dei Giampà, che un tempo costituivano un'unica organizzazione criminale, a seguito di una grave scissione interna diventano protagonisti di una cruenta guerra di mafia.

descriptions: Giampà (with Iannazzo) made peace with Torcasio-Gualtieri in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2015 con l'operazione Andromeda viene fatta luce sulla pace tra gli Iannazzo-Giampà ed i Torcasio-Gualtieri avvenuta anche grazie alla mediazione di clan del reggino.

descriptions: Iannazzo is in a faida (conflict) with Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra.
edges.evidence_quote: faida ... tra i Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra e gli Iannazzo- Giampà

descriptions: Iannazzo (with Giampà) made peace with Torcasio-Gualtieri in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2015 con l'operazione Andromeda viene fatta luce sulla pace tra gli Iannazzo-Giampà ed i Torcasio-Gualtieri avvenuta anche grazie alla mediazione di clan del reggino.

descriptions: Strangio supplied cocaine to Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 31 gennaio 2017 si conclude l'operazione Dioniso ... cocaina fornita dagli Strangio di San Luca.

Sword Boys.description: Street gang in Perth, Western Australia, consisting mostly of Lebanese Australians, known to authorities since the mid-1990s. Members wear a miniature gold scimitar necklace. Involved in amphetamine and ecstasy distribution, and linked to car rebirthing. Members were convicted in 2016 for drug trafficking.

descriptions: Members of Sword Boys have links to a Perth Asian street gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The brothers have links to a notorious Perth Asian street gang jailed for their involvement in the 2013 extortion of a karaoke bar.

descriptions: Los Tlacos is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Tlacos

descriptions: Black Gaza lists PRLane as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: GGE, 6th/ACG, PRLane

descriptions: The Bowery Boys were allied with the Empire Guards.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Guards, Atlantic Guards, Empire Guards, O'Connell Guards, True Blue Americans, American Republican Party (American Nativist Party, American Party), Order of the Star Spangled Banner (Anti-immigrant secret society)

descriptions: Empire Guards listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department

descriptions: Los Palillos was the armed wing of Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Palillos ("The Toothpicks") was a group operating within Tijuana Cartel, who worked as the armed wing of the Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Scattered Spider formed a collective with Lapsus$ and ShinyHunters in 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: A collective of cybercrime groups, including Scattered Spider, Lapsus$ and ShinyHunters was forged in 2025, and has created at least 16 Telegram channels since August 8, 2025.

descriptions: Mali Boys killed a member associated with Beaumont Crew, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: Jaden was associated with rival gang Beaumont Crew (also known as Let's Get Rich) and was allegedly out drug dealing at the time of death.

descriptions: Mali Boys splintered from Beaumont Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mali Boys emerged in 2015 after it splintered off from the Beaumont Crew gang.

'Ndrina Ruga.description: The 'Ndrina Ruga is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Monasterace, Italy, dominant in the Stilaro Valley until the mid-1990s. Its activities include construction contracts, agricultural control, and kidnappings in the 1980s. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking and money laundering in Anzio and Nettuno, and has alliances with other 'ndrine. Many members were arrested in the 1994 Operation Stilaro, but some were later acquitted.

descriptions: Gallace and Ruga were allies against Vallelunga-Novella-Sia in the second boschi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 ... tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: Gallace are allied with Ruga di Monasterace.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Leuzzi di Stignano e dei Ruga di Monasterace.

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Ruga.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Ruga is allied with Gallace-Novella.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei ... Gallace-Novella di Guardavalle

descriptions: Loiero joined the Ruga-Metastasio-Gallace alliance in 1998.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1998 i Loiero si aggiungono all'alleanza Ruga-Metastasio- Gallace

descriptions: Ruga is allied with Metastasio.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Metastasio di Stilo

descriptions: Ruga-Metastasio were in a feud with Sia-Procopio between 2008 and 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2012 scoppiò una faida tra i Ruga-Metastasio e i Sia-Procopio collegata alla nuova faida dei boschi

descriptions: Ruga, Leuzzi, and Vallelonga formed a mafia consortium.
edges.evidence_quote: Il processo faida dei boschi sancisce la presenza di una consorteria mafiosa dei Ruga-Leuzzi-Vallelonga

descriptions: Ruga and Commisso were involved together in water transport.
edges.evidence_quote: Avrebbero dovuto pagare un 'diritto di carico' per evitare rischi durante il trasporto delle bottiglie d'acqua lungo la penisola, in cui erano coinvolti anche i Commisso

descriptions: Ruga is allied with Leuzzi.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei ... Leuzzi di Stignano

descriptions: The Musitano 'ndrina was affiliated with the Ruga 'ndrina in Italy during the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: it was affiliated with the 'ndrine Ruga and Aquilino

descriptions: Khanh's organization forced Hung Cuba's group to submit after a failed negotiation, then merged the two groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Khanh attempted to negotiate with Hung Cuba for control over these areas, but the two didn't come to an agreement. In response, Khanh had his men block all of the routes to the bus station and Long Bien market. Unable to transport or receive any of his goods from shippers, Hung Cuba was forced to submit to Khanh's will.

descriptions: Infobox lists Renegades Motorcycle Club as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Renegades Motorcycle Club(Canada)

descriptions: Guerrilleros is a support club of Median Empire.
edges.evidence_quote: Median Empire has established a support club, known as the Guerrilleros, with chapters in both Germany and Sweden.

descriptions: MOD and Asian Family Gangsters were in conflict, with MOD retaliating with a drive-by shooting.
edges.evidence_quote: tensions between the Menace of Destruction and the Asian Family Gangsters were intense. Following the death of a young M.O.D gang member and a shooting at several Tiny Little Rascals; a junior version of M.O.D, the M.O.D retaliated by performing a drive-by shooting in North Sacramento Asian Family Gangsters' turf, killing a rival gang member.

descriptions: Infobox lists Kinfolk as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Cobra, Comanchero MC, Cossacks MC, Finks MC, Gremium MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Kinfolk MC, Mongols MC, No Surrender MC, Notorious MC, Rebels MC, Red Devils MC, Rock Machine MC, Satudarah MC, Vagos MC

descriptions: Kinfolk are rivals of Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels , the Mongols the Kinfolk , and the Vagos .

descriptions: Hunt's Point Family Bloods is a set of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: 9 members of the Hunt’s Point Family Bloods were arrested

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was rival to D'Amico and De Micco.
edges.evidence_quote: disputato da clan rivali, come i clan D'Amico (detti fraulella) e i clan De Micco (detti i bodo)

descriptions: The D'Amico clan was a rival disputing territory with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the clan gradually lost control of the territory, disputed by rival clans, such as the D'Amico clan (called Fraulella) and the De Micco clan (called Bodo).

descriptions: Redut's leader is involved in the creation of Africa Corps, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Konstantin Mirzayants, a purported leader of Redut, is reportedly closely involved in the MoD's operations in Africa and the creation of the Africa Corps.

Naserligan.description: Criminal organization primarily active in Gothenburg, Sweden, founded by Naser Dzeljilji around 2000. Involved in drug trafficking, illegal gambling, armed robbery, extortion, and protection racketing. Gained notoriety in 2001 during a violent conflict with the Original Gangsters over control of the illegal gambling market. Membership is diverse, including individuals of Albanian and Swedish descent.

descriptions: Naserligan and Original Gangsters were in a violent conflict over control of illegal gambling in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: Naserligan gained notoriety in 2001 when it became embroiled in a violent conflict with another gang, the Original Gangsters.

descriptions: Original Gangsters and Naserligan engaged in violent conflict over profitable activities in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: The first known large-scale violent conflict was in 2000, with the Naserligan gang, the members of which was of Albanian extraction.

descriptions: The Serb mafia is a rival of Naser Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Princ Gang , UÇK , Naser Gang

descriptions: Morabito has ties with Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma possono contare su legami con i Maisano, Pansera, Versace , Zappia, Mollica, Criaco e Scriva.

descriptions: Morabito has strong ties with Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morabitos also maintain strong ties with the Maisano, Pansera, Versace, Zappia, Mollica, Criaco, and Scriva 'ndrine.

descriptions: Piromalli subdued the Versace through homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: porta alla luce 37 omicidi i quali piegano i Versace, i Priolo e i Giuliano

descriptions: Molè helped Piromalli and Longo kill Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'aiuto di vecchi alleati - i Piromalli - Molè di Gioia Tauro - riuscirono ad ucciderlo

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè helped Longo kill Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'aiuto di vecchi alleati - i Piromalli - Molè di Gioia Tauro - riuscirono ad ucciderlo

descriptions: Versace Longo fought a war with Giovinazzo over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: si scontrarono con i Giovinazzo (di Taurianova), in una guerra per il controllo del traffico di droga, tra il 1988 e il 1990

descriptions: Longo and Versace merged through marriage; Versace took over Longo's operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Violetta Longo, figlia di Luigi, sposò Antonio Versace, che prese il posto del suocero

descriptions: Ba'ath Brigades are listed as opponents of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Ba'ath Brigades

edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Ahrar al-Sharqiya

descriptions: Jamaat-ud-Dawa reorganized as Tehreek-e-Tahafuz Qibla Awal after the ban.
edges.evidence_quote: In response to the UN resolution and the government ban, the JuD reorganized itself under the name of Tehreek-e-Tahafuz Qibla Awal (TTQA).

descriptions: Tehrik-e-Tahafuz Qibla Awwal is an affiliate of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: On 25 June 2014, the United States added several of LeT affiliates including Jamaat-ud-Dawa, Al-Anfal Trust, Tehrik-e-Hurmat-e-Rasool, and Tehrik-e-Tahafuz Qibla Awwal to the list of foreign terrorist organizations.

descriptions: Black Fear North is a support club of Trust MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the support clubs are Iron Fist MC, Black Claw Kitzingen, Black Fear North.
